content:
🔥 qnote | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: A lightweight, feature-rich desktop application for writing, organizing, and exporting notes in plain text and Markdown formats.
✨ Key Features: • Plain text and Markdown editing • Live Markdown preview • Formatting toolbar • File history with search • Version history
📖 Summary: qnote is a minimal, cross-platform desktop note editor built with Tauri and React. It focuses on providing a clean interface for writing and managing notes, with features like Markdown support, live preview, file history, and PDF/HTML export.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
